clips.title: Reaching Hands
clips.prompt: Cinematic photoreal, warm candlelit grade. An intimate candlelit dinner, soft glow, wine glasses, a small table for two. A person in elegant evening wear reaches across the table to take a partner's hand, tender and adoring, a soft smile. Flickering candles, warm bokeh, rose petals. Slow dolly in, shallow depth of field, subtle grain, 24fps.

A person shares a single umbrella with a partner, leaning close and smiling shyly, shoulders touching. Falling rain, warm streetlight, puddle reflections. Orbit left, tender, 24fps.
